title: High Risk Alerts: NetWitness Endpoint for BETHANYCHUCHU

risk_rating.rationale: High alert volume (1558), lateral movement and UAC disable alerts, and traffic to known malicious IPs indicate adversary is highly likely to have initiated and the event is occurring at a critical frequency with almost certain adverse impact.

ioc_summary:
[AVAILABILITY] High CPU usage, Configuration changes, Unexplained changes from privileged accounts — High CPU usage likely due to malicious activity (alert count 1558). Configuration changes and unexplained privileged account activity are indicated by 'Disables UAC' alert and SYSTEM account usage.
[CONFIDENTIALITY] Changes in network traffic telemetry (known bad IPs/domains), Unknown traffic originating from/terminating on the device, Geographic-based anomalies — Traffic to known malicious IPs (4.175.87.197, 111.223.64.89) and unusual destinations (e.g., 20.247.184.197). Geographic anomalies: 111.223.64.89 likely outside normal region.
[INTEGRITY] Odd device/platform behaviour, Unknown binaries installed, Unknown process running, Configuration changes, Unexplained changes from privileged accounts — Odd behavior: 'Lateral Move Detected' and 'Disables UAC' alerts. Unknown binaries/processes likely from lateral movement. Configuration changes and unexplained privileged account activity (SYSTEM).
summary: Host BETHANYCHUCHU shows signs of active lateral movement and privilege escalation with 1558 alerts, including 'Lateral Move Detected' and 'Disables UAC'. Traffic to known malicious IPs (4.175.87.197, 111.223.64.89) and high CPU usage indicate ongoing compromise.
recommended_actions: Isolate host BETHANYCHUCHU from network immediately
Initiate incident response and collect forensic evidence
Block malicious IPs and review privileged account activity
